description: Frozen submission values for self-contained figure regeneration; external cluster summaries are not stored in this checkout.

provenance.prioritybench: Exact W5 stress manifest recomputed with the pinned Qwen3 tokenizer; 120 contexts.
provenance.bfcl_protected_fraction: Copied from the external BFCL protected-fraction summary used for the reported submission result; the originating cluster artifact is unavailable locally.
provenance.bfcl_arm_counts: Exact paired pass counts copied from the frozen external Qwen and Llama summaries used in paper/body.tex.
